SEOContent.what_is_text: Sorteo Pro is the ultimate free giveaway tool for influencers and brands. It allows you to select random winners from unlimited lists for Instagram, YouTube, and TikTok contests. Featuring a cryptographically secure RNG, Wheel of Names, and instant certificate verification, it is the secure, no-login alternative to paid services.
SEOContent.feature_1_desc: Uses cryptographically secure random number generation to ensure fairness.
SEOContent.feature_2_desc: Choose from multiple themes like Slot Machine, Roulette, or Matrix to match your brand.
SEOContent.feature_3_desc: Cinematic animations and sound effects create excitement for your audience.
SEOContent.step_1: Enter participant names manually or paste a list.
SEOContent.step_2: Customize the look and feel using the visual editor.
SEOContent.step_3: Click 'Start' and watch the magic happen!
SEOContent.faq_1_answer: Yes, Sorteo Pro is completely free to use for all your giveaways.
SEOContent.faq_2_answer: Yes, your theme settings are saved locally in your browser.

WheelGeo.title: Wheel of Names & Random Picker
WheelGeo.description: Looking for a Wheel of Names? Sorteo Pro includes a fully customizable Random Name Picker Wheel that is fair, free, and fun.
WheelGeo.what_is_wheel: What is a Wheel of Names?
WheelGeo.what_is_wheel_answer: A Wheel of Names is a digital tool that picks a random winner by spinning a virtual wheel. It is popularly used by teachers, influencers, and event organizers for random selection. Sorteo Pro upgrades this experience with cinematic effects.
WheelGeo.how_to_title: How to create a Wheel of Names
WheelGeo.how_to_step_1: Enter the names of participants manually or paste a list from Excel/Text.
WheelGeo.how_to_step_2: Customize the wheel colors, spin duration, and sound effects in the 'Visual Editor'.
WheelGeo.how_to_step_3: Click 'Start Giveaway' to spin the wheel and pick a random winner.
WheelGeo.how_to_step_4: Share the official Certificate of Validity with your audience.

Glossary.title: Giveaway Glossary
Glossary.def_1: An algorithm that generates a sequence of numbers or symbols that cannot be reasonably predicted better than by random chance. Sorteo Pro uses cryptographically secure RNG.
Glossary.def_2: A system that allows players to verify that the outcome of a game or raffle was generated correctly and was not manipulated by the operator.
Glossary.def_3: A tool designed to select a random winner from the comments section of an Instagram post. Sorteo Pro offers a free alternative to these tools.
Glossary.def_4: A tool that shuffles a list of items into a completely random order using cryptographic algorithms. Essential for deciding turn orders or pairing teams.
Glossary.def_5: A visual random selector that mimics a physical spinning wheel. It divides the circle into segments representing participants and spins to select one at random.
Glossary.def_6: A decision-making tool that randomly selects between 'Yes' and 'No' with equal probability, similar to flipping a coin.
Glossary.def_7: A digital tool that picks a letter from the alphabet (A-Z) at random. Useful for word games, teaching phonics, and initialisms.

InstagramPicker.title: Free Instagram Comment Picker | Unlimited & No Login
InstagramPicker.description: Pick random winners from Instagram comments for free. No limits, no login required. The best alternative to paid tools.
InstagramPicker.subtitle: The fairest and easiest way to pick winners for your Instagram Giveaways.
InstagramPicker.direct_answer_title: What is an Instagram Comment Picker?
InstagramPicker.direct_answer_text: An Instagram Comment Picker is a tool that automatically selects a random winner from the comments of an Instagram post. Unlike other tools that charge for high comment counts, Sorteo Pro is 100% free and supports unlimited comments.
InstagramPicker.feature_1_desc: No hidden fees. Whether you have 100 or 100,000 comments, it's free.
InstagramPicker.feature_2_desc: We don't ask for your Instagram password or permissions. Just paste the list.
InstagramPicker.feature_3_desc: We use cryptographic algorithms to ensure the winner is truly random.
InstagramPicker.how_to_title: How to pick a winner from Instagram comments
InstagramPicker.step_1: Export your comments (using any free export tool).
InstagramPicker.step_2: Copy and paste the list of usernames into Sorteo Pro.
InstagramPicker.step_3: Click 'Start Giveaway' to pick a random winner.
InstagramPicker.faq_1_q: Is this Instagram Picker really free?
InstagramPicker.faq_1_a: Yes! We believe creators shouldn't pay to give back to their community.
InstagramPicker.faq_2_q: Is there a limit on comments?
InstagramPicker.faq_2_a: No limits. You can paste as many participants as you want.

WheelGeoPage.title: Wheel of Names | Random Name Picker (Free & Ad-Free)
WheelGeoPage.description: The best free Wheel of Names. Spin the wheel to pick a random winner. No ads, no login, and fully customizable themes.
WheelGeoPage.subtitle: Spin the wheel to make random decisions in style.
WheelGeoPage.direct_answer_title: What is a Wheel of Names?
WheelGeoPage.direct_answer_text: A Wheel of Names is a free online tool to pick a random name, number, or item. It is widely used by teachers for classrooms, raffles, and gamified decisions. Sorteo Pro offers a premium, ad-free experience with cinematic effects.
WheelGeoPage.faq_1_q: Is this Wheel of Names rigorous?
WheelGeoPage.faq_1_a: Yes, we use a cryptographically secure random number generator (CSPRNG) to ensure every spin is 100% random and unbiased.
WheelGeoPage.faq_2_a: Your lists and settings are automatically saved in your browser's local storage so you never lose them.

GlossaryPage.title: Giveaway & Random Picker Glossary | Sorteo Pro
GlossaryPage.description: Comprehensive glossary of terms related to giveaways, random number generation, and social media contests. Understand how Sorteo Pro ensures fairness.
GlossaryPage.subtitle: Everything you need to know about fair giveaways and random selection technology.
GlossaryPage.def_wheel: A visual random selector that mimics a physical spinning wheel. It divides the circle into segments representing participants and spins to select one at random.
GlossaryPage.cta_title: Ready to run a fair giveaway?

Versus.title: The Best AppSorteos Alternative for Instagram (Free & Unlimited)
Versus.description: Looking for an AppSorteos alternative? Sorteo Pro allows you to pick Instagram winners for free and without comment limits. 2024 Comparison.
Versus.header_desc: We analyze AppSorteos vs Sorteo Pro. Discover why thousands of users are switching.
Versus.direct_answer_title: What is the best free alternative to AppSorteos?
Versus.direct_answer_text: Sorteo Pro is the best free AppSorteos alternative for 2025. While AppSorteos forces you to pay for >1,000 comments, Sorteo Pro offers unlimited comments, no login requirements, and a verifiable Certificate of Validity — 100% free forever.

why_us.title: Why are we better than free EasyPromos alternatives?
why_us.p1: Many creators look for 'free EasyPromos alternatives' because traditional tools have become too expensive. Sorteo Pro was born to break that barrier.
why_us.p2: Unlike the competition, we don't charge for your giveaway's success. If you have 10,000 comments, great! We don't penalize you for it.
why_us.title_2: The AppSorteos competitor that cares about your wallet
why_us.p3: Stop calculating how much your next giveaway will cost. With Sorteo Pro, your budget is zero.
why_us.direct_answer_title: What is the best free AppSorteos alternative?
why_us.direct_answer_text: The best free alternative to AppSorteos is Sorteo Pro. While AppSorteos charges for giveaways with more than 1,000 comments, Sorteo Pro allows unlimited comments completely free, without requiring login or subscriptions.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: Is there a free site like EasyPromos?
faq.a1: Yes, Sorteo Pro is the most robust free alternative to EasyPromos, offering certified winner selection without the high subscription costs.
faq.q2: Is it really free with no limits?
faq.a2: Absolutely. You can upload massive lists of participants and run unlimited giveaways without paying anything.
faq.q3: Do I need to sign up?
faq.a3: No. We respect your privacy and time. Enter and create your giveaway instantly.

RngGeo.direct_answer_title: What is a Random Number Generator?
RngGeo.direct_answer_text: A Random Number Generator (RNG) is a tool that produces a number or sequence of numbers that cannot be reasonably predicted. Sorteo Pro uses a cryptographically secure algorithm to ensure every number is 100% fair and unbiased.
RngGeo.feature_1_desc: Powered by secure algorithms to prevent bias.
RngGeo.feature_2_desc: Generate as many numbers as you need for free.
RngGeo.feature_3_desc: Get your random numbers in milliseconds.
RngGeo.how_to_title: How to use the Random Number Generator
RngGeo.how_to_step_1: Enter the list of numbers or options you want to randomize.
RngGeo.how_to_step_2: Select the 'Slot Machine' style for a classic RNG look.
RngGeo.how_to_step_3: Click 'Start Giveaway' to generate a random number.
RngGeo.how_to_step_4: Share the verified result with your audience.

RngPage.title: Random Number Generator | Free & Secure RNG
RngPage.description: Generate random numbers instantly with Sorteo Pro. Free, secure, and customizable random number generator for games, lotteries, and scientific use.
RngPage.faq_1_a: Yes, we use a cryptographically secure pseudo-random number generator (CSPRNG) which is the industry standard for fairness.
RngPage.faq_2_q: Is there a limit to how many numbers I can generate?
RngPage.faq_2_a: No, you can generate unlimited random numbers for free.

ListRandomizerPage.title: List Randomizer | Random Team Generator & Sorter
ListRandomizerPage.description: The best free List Randomizer and Random Team Generator. Shuffle a list, pick a winner, or split items into random groups instantly. Secure & free.
ListRandomizerPage.subtitle: Shuffle lists, split teams, and pick items instantly.
ListRandomizerPage.faq_1_q: How does the List Randomizer work?
ListRandomizerPage.faq_1_a: We use a Fisher-Yates shuffle algorithm powered by cryptographically secure random numbers to ensure a truly random order.
ListRandomizerPage.faq_2_q: Can I randomize names for a raffle?
ListRandomizerPage.faq_2_a: Yes! Just paste your list of names, and the tool will pick a winner or shuffle the entire list.

ListRandomizerGeo.direct_answer_title: What is a List Randomizer & Team Generator?
ListRandomizerGeo.direct_answer_text: A List Randomizer is a tool that takes a list of items (names, numbers, or options) and rearranges them into a completely random order. It is essential for giveaways, random team generation, and unbiased sorting. Sorteo Pro offers a free, secure list randomizer with instant results.
ListRandomizerGeo.feature_1_desc: Uses secure algorithms to ensure no bias in the order.
ListRandomizerGeo.feature_2_desc: Perfect for splitting groups into random teams or pairs.
ListRandomizerGeo.feature_4_desc: See the randomization happen in real-time.
ListRandomizerGeo.how_to_step_1: Enter the list of names, items, or numbers you want to shuffle.
ListRandomizerGeo.how_to_step_2: Choose the 'Grid' or 'List' view from the Visual Editor.
ListRandomizerGeo.how_to_step_3: Click 'Start Giveaway' to randomize the order instantly.
ListRandomizerGeo.how_to_step_4: Use the result to form teams, assign tasks, or pick a winner.

YesNoPage.title: Yes or No Wheel | Random Decision Maker
YesNoPage.description: Spin the Yes or No Wheel to make a random decision. Free, fair, and fun way to decide. Flip a coin style wheel.

YesNoGeo.title: Yes or No Wheel
YesNoGeo.what_is_title: What is a Yes or No Wheel?
YesNoGeo.what_is_answer: A Yes or No Wheel is a simple random decision tool. It works like flipping a coin but with a visual spinning wheel. Sorteo Pro provides a fair, 50/50 chance for every spin using secure RNG.
YesNoGeo.how_to_title: How to use the Yes or No Wheel
YesNoGeo.how_to_step_1: The wheel is already set up with 'YES' and 'NO' options.
YesNoGeo.how_to_step_2: Click 'Start Giveaway' to spin the wheel.
YesNoGeo.how_to_step_3: Wait for the wheel to stop on a random answer.
YesNoGeo.how_to_step_4: Share the result if you like!
YesNoGeo.faq_1_q: Is the Yes or No Wheel fair?
YesNoGeo.faq_1_a: Yes, it uses a cryptographically secure random number generator to ensure a true 50/50 probability.
YesNoGeo.faq_2_a: Yes! Click 'Customize' to add more options like 'Maybe' or 'Ask again'.

LetterGeoPage.title: Random Letter Generator | Alphabet Picker
LetterGeoPage.description: Pick a random letter from the alphabet instantly. Free, ad-free, and perfect for classroom games (Categories, Scattergories).
LetterGeoPage.subtitle: Spin to pick a random letter from A to Z.
LetterGeoPage.faq_1_q: Is the letter selection truly random?
LetterGeoPage.faq_1_a: Yes, we use a secure random number generator to ensure every letter has an equal chance of being selected.
LetterGeoPage.faq_2_q: Can I remove letters that have been picked?
LetterGeoPage.faq_2_a: Yes! Just toggle the 'Remove winner' option in settings if you want unique letters each time.

LetterGeo.direct_answer_title: What is a Random Letter Generator?
LetterGeo.direct_answer_text: A Random Letter Generator is a tool that selects a letter from the alphabet (A-Z) completely by chance. It is widely used for games like Scattergories, teaching phonics, or initializing creative writing prompts. Sorteo Pro offers a fair, visual way to pick letters instantly.
LetterGeo.feature_1_desc: Includes all 26 letters of the English alphabet.
LetterGeo.feature_2_desc: Get a random letter in seconds.
LetterGeo.feature_3_desc: Every letter has an equal 1/26 probability.
LetterGeo.feature_4_desc: Perfect for playing games on the go.
LetterGeo.how_to_title: How to generate a random letter
LetterGeo.how_to_step_1: The generator is pre-loaded with letters A-Z.
LetterGeo.how_to_step_2: Select your preferred visual style (Wheel or Cards).
LetterGeo.how_to_step_3: Click 'Start Giveaway' to pick a letter.
LetterGeo.how_to_step_4: Use the letter for your game or activity!

LetterGeo.direct_answer_text: A Random Letter Generator is a tool that picks a letter from the English alphabet (A-Z) purely by chance. It is commonly used for educational games, word games like Scattergories, and creative writing prompts. Sorteo Pro ensures true randomness.
LetterGeo.feature_1_desc: Includes all 26 letters of the English alphabet.
